title: Sciodaphyllum pittieri
taxonomy: Sciodaphyllum pittieri is a species of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. It is a type of tree native to Central and South America. The classification of Sciodaphyllum pittieri places it within the genus Sciodaphyllum and the family Araliaceae. This classification suggests a close relationship to other plants within the Araliaceae family, such as the genus Schefflera. Further research may provide more specific information on the taxonomic classification of Sciodaphyllum pittieri.

It is said to have anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce pain and swelling.
